subject: Duplicate email notifications for @mentions
message:
Hello FlowSync Support,

We recently migrated our team (AuroraCode) to FlowSync and are seeing duplicate email notifications whenever someone @mentions another user in a task comment. For example, I receive two identical emails for a single mention. This started earlier this week and seems to affect multiple teammates.

Environment details:
- Web app in Chrome (Version 122)
- Workspace: AuroraCode
- Project: Sprint - Mobile App

We have already tried disabling and re-enabling email notifications under Settings → Notifications, but the issue persists. Could you advise how to resolve this?

Thank you,
Priya
notes: Likely notification settings overlap (watch + mention). Ask if they are 'watching' tasks/project and if multiple workspaces enabled.

subject: Timeline view shows blank for one project
message:
Hi team,

In FlowSync, the Timeline (Gantt) view is completely blank for one of our projects, even though tasks exist. The Board and List views show tasks normally.

Project: Client - Helios Rebrand
Workspace: Keller Studio

We expected the tasks to appear on the timeline. Do tasks require start/due dates to show up? If so, is there a way to bulk add dates?

Regards,
Martin
notes: Explain timeline requires dates; suggest filters check; offer steps to add dates (multi-select).

subject: Question about Pro plan billing and annual discount
message:
Hello,

We are currently on the Free plan and considering upgrading to Pro for ~45 users. Before I proceed, I need clarification on the following:
1) Do you offer annual billing for Pro (and if so, is there a discount)?
2) Can we purchase via invoice instead of credit card?
3) Do you support adding a VAT number on invoices?

Please advise so we can finalize procurement this week.

Thank you,
Alyssa Chen
NorthPeak AI
escalation_reason: Billing/pricing/invoice/VAT questions require Billing/RevOps review.
notes: Must escalate to Billing/RevOps. Collect company address, billing contact, country, VAT ID.

subject: Requesting refund for unexpected charge
message:
Hi FlowSync,

We were charged $1,160 yesterday for what appears to be an annual renewal, but we did not authorize an annual plan. We intended to remain on monthly Pro.

Workspace: Cobalt Agency
Billing email: diego@cobaltagency.mx

Please refund this charge and confirm the subscription is set to monthly.

Regards,
Diego
escalation_reason: Refund/charge dispute must be handled by Billing/RevOps.
notes: Escalate; request last 4 digits of card (if policy allows) and invoice ID; acknowledge urgency.

subject: Cannot invite new members (permission error)
message:
Hello Support,

I am trying to invite two new teammates to our workspace, but I receive a permissions error when I click “Invite”. I am currently listed as an Admin, not Owner.

Workspace: BrightLane
Error: “You don’t have permission to manage members.”

Can you confirm whether Admins can invite members, or whether this requires the Owner role?

Thanks,
Sara
notes: Explain role limits: Owner can manage members/billing; Admin may be restricted. Suggest contacting owner to change role.

subject: GitHub integration not updating task status after PR merge
message:
Hi FlowSync Support,

We connected GitHub last week and linked PRs to tasks. However, when a PR is merged, the related task does not move to Done as expected.

We are using GitHub org ‘rivermetrics’ and FlowSync project ‘Backend Sprint 14’. The PRs are correctly linked in the task sidebar.

Is there a specific event setting we need to enable, or should we reconnect the integration?

Best,
Ethan
notes: Suggest confirm repos selected, permissions, mapping rules; try reconnect GitHub integration; check automation rules.

subject: Export to CSV fails on large project
message:
Hello,

When I attempt to export our project to CSV (Project Settings → Export → CSV), the export spinner runs for a while and then fails with “Something went wrong”.

Project: Operations Master
Approx. tasks: ~3,500
Browser: Safari 17

Is there a size limit? If not, can you recommend a workaround?

Thanks,
Hannah
notes: Suggest try Chrome, export smaller range/filtered view; if persists, escalate to Engineering with project size and error timestamp.

subject: Account deletion request for former employee
message:
Hi FlowSync,

We have a former employee who still appears as a user in our workspace. We want to remove and permanently delete their account and associated personal data.

Workspace: SkylarkDev
User email: j.tucker@skylarkdev.io

Please let me know the steps and what verification you need from us.

Regards,
Noah Patel
escalation_reason: Data deletion/personal data request requires verified escalation.
notes: Escalate to Security/Privacy workflow; confirm requester role and ownership.

subject: Feature request: recurring tasks and templates
message:
Hi FlowSync team,

We love the UI and speed—great work. One feature we’re missing is recurring tasks (e.g., monthly client reports) and better template management across projects.

Do you have this on the roadmap? If not, could you share a recommended workaround?

Thanks,
Lena
notes: Acknowledge, capture feedback, suggest duplicating template projects and using automations as workaround.

subject: Severe performance issues in the web app
message:
Hello,

Over the last two days, FlowSync has become extremely slow for our team. Boards take 20–30 seconds to load, and moving tasks sometimes results in the UI freezing. This is impacting delivery.

Workspace: HighTower
Users affected: ~25
Browsers: Chrome and Edge
Network: multiple locations

Is there an ongoing incident? If this continues we will need to consider switching tools.

Regards,
Omar
escalation_reason: Potential outage/performance incident affecting many users with churn risk language.
notes: Escalate to Engineering/Incident. Collect timestamps, regions, HAR if possible; provide quick mitigations (clear cache, reduce filters).

subject: Need SOC 2 report and DPA
message:
Hi FlowSync,

We are evaluating FlowSync for internal operations. Before we can proceed, our compliance team needs your SOC 2 report and a Data Processing Agreement (DPA).

Can you share these documents and confirm where data is hosted?

Thank you,
Chloe Ramirez
escalation_reason: Compliance/SOC2/DPA request requires Security/Legal/BizOps handling.
notes: Escalate; gather company name, procurement timeline.

subject: Automation rule not firing when status changes
message:
Hello,

We set up an automation: “When status changes to Done → post message to Slack channel #shipping”. It worked once yesterday but isn’t firing today.

Project: LoopForge Release
Slack integration connected

Are there automation limits or conditions that might prevent it from triggering?

Thanks,
Jason
notes: Check automation conditions, permissions, Slack channel mapping; confirm plan limits; suggest re-auth integration.

subject: Cannot receive mobile push notifications
message:
Hi Support,

I’m not receiving push notifications on iOS even though they are enabled in FlowSync settings. Email notifications work.

Device: iPhone 14
iOS: 17.3
App version: 2.8.1

Could you share the recommended troubleshooting steps?

Best,
Maya
notes: Provide OS permission steps, ensure push toggles in app; suggest reinstall/log out/in.

subject: Request to transfer workspace ownership
message:
Hello FlowSync,

Our current workspace owner has left the company. We need to transfer ownership of the AtlasOps workspace to a new admin, and also update the billing contact.

Workspace: AtlasOps
Current owner email: devin@atlasops.io
New owner email: ben@atlasops.io

Please advise the process and any verification required.

Thanks,
Ben
escalation_reason: Account ownership and billing contact change requires verified escalation.
notes: Escalate to Support Ops/Security; require verification.

subject: Comments not showing for one task
message:
Hi,

We have a task where comments appear to be missing. Teammates swear they posted updates, but the comment thread is blank when I open it.

Task: “Launch checklist”
Project: Q2 Release
Workspace: ZenByte

Could this be a caching issue, or did the comments fail to save? If needed I can send screenshots.

Regards,
Kira
escalation_reason: Potential data integrity/bug report involving missing comments.
notes: Try basic troubleshooting (refresh/incognito). If reproducible, escalate to Engineering with task ID, timeline.

subject: How do I bulk change task assignees?
message:
Hello,

We are reorganizing teams and need to bulk reassign tasks from one teammate to another across a project.

Is there a way to multi-select tasks and change the assignee in one action?

Thank you,
Tomás
notes: Provide steps for multi-select and bulk edit; mention permissions.

subject: We will involve our lawyer if this isn’t fixed
message:
FlowSync Support,

We have been locked out of our workspace for hours and cannot access any project data. This is unacceptable for a company handling patient operations. If this is not resolved immediately, we will involve our lawyer.

Workspace: CandorHealth

Respond urgently.

Emily
escalation_reason: Legal threat + potential outage/access issue.
notes: Escalate to Incident + Legal/Security. Provide immediate acknowledgement and collect error details.

subject: Question: time tracking reports by user
message:
Hi,

Does FlowSync support time tracking reports broken down by user and project? We need monthly exports for invoicing clients.

If so, where can we access those reports and can they be exported?

Thanks,
Ravi
notes: Guide to Reports → Time Tracking; export options; mention permissions.

subject: SSO login looping back to sign-in page
message:
Hello Support,

We are on Enterprise and configured SSO (SAML). Since yesterday, users who click “Sign in with SSO” are redirected back to the FlowSync sign-in page without any error message.

Workspace: HoneycombApps
IdP: Okta

Could you help us troubleshoot? This is blocking the entire team.

Best,
Stephanie
escalation_reason: SSO/SAML authentication issue for Enterprise workspace.
notes: Escalate to Security/Enterprise support; collect SAML request/response logs, time of failure.

subject: Compliment: onboarding was smooth
message:
Hi FlowSync team,

Just wanted to say the onboarding experience was excellent. We set up our workspace, imported tasks, and connected Slack in under an hour.

Keep up the great work.

Best,
Yousef
notes: Thank and optionally ask permission to use quote; tag as feedback.

message: hey! timeline view empty 😕 tasks r there tho. what do i do
notes: Ask if tasks have dates; quick guidance.

message: no llegan notificaciones push 😩 iphone
notes: Mixed Spanish; ask iOS version and app notif permission.

message: app super slow today. board takes forever. team mad
escalation_reason: Possible incident/performance affecting multiple users.
notes: Escalate if multiple users impacted; collect location/time.

message: hi we got charged twice?? pls refund asap
escalation_reason: Billing charge/refund request.
notes: Billing escalation. Ask for invoice ID and workspace.

message: how do i @ mention someone?
notes: Simple how-to.

message: github sync not working. pr merged but task still doing
notes: Guide to reconnect integration + check mapping/automation.

message: comments disappeared on a task?? wtf
escalation_reason: Potential data loss/data integrity bug.
notes: Escalate; ask for task name/link + approx time.

message: need human pls
escalation_reason: Customer requested a human agent.
notes: Immediate escalation; keep response short.

message: new here 🙋‍♀️ how do i create a project template?
notes: Template how-to.

message: nao consigo fazer login
notes: Portuguese; ask if SSO, suggest reset password and check email.

message: can u change me to annual + invoice?
escalation_reason: Billing plan change and invoice request.
notes: Escalate RevOps.

message: export csv error again 😓 same project as last week
notes: Repeat issue; suggest smaller export/chrome; escalate if persists.

message: where do i turn off email spam lol
notes: Notification settings guidance.

message: all projects missing??? what happened
escalation_reason: Potential data integrity/outage symptom.
notes: Escalate Engineering/Incident; ask workspace name + screenshot.

message: automation not firing. set status done -> slack. nothing
notes: Automation troubleshooting steps.

message: love the app! can we get recurring tasks? 🙏
notes: Feature request; log feedback.

message: we cant access workspace. pls fix NOW or we cancel
escalation_reason: High-severity access issue + churn risk language.
notes: Cross-channel with CandorHealth email threat; escalate incident.

message: need to change owner. old guy left. can u do it
escalation_reason: Workspace ownership transfer requires verification.
notes: Cross-channel with AtlasOps email; escalate Support Ops/Security.

message: sso login keeps looping 😭 whole team blocked
escalation_reason: Enterprise SSO/SAML issue blocks team.
notes: Cross-channel with HoneycombApps SSO email; escalate.

message: not working
notes: Near-empty; must ask clarifying question (load, save, login?).

subject: Onboarding: setting up our first workspace
message: We’re setting up FlowSync for a 12-person product team. What’s the recommended workspace structure (projects, templates, permissions) for product + engineering?
notes: Provide recommended starter structure and role guidance.

subject: How to export project data for a client
message: Need to export a project (tasks + assignees + dates) to share with a client. What export formats are supported and where do I find the export option?
notes: Guide to Project Settings → Export → CSV.

subject: Billing: invoice shows wrong company name
message: Our latest invoice has the wrong legal entity name and address. Please correct and reissue the invoice for this month. Workspace: CrescentOps.
escalation_reason: Invoice correction request must be handled by Billing/RevOps.
notes: Escalate; ask for correct legal name/address and invoice number.

subject: Technical: Slack notifications not posting
message: We connected Slack but task updates aren’t showing in our channel anymore. It worked previously. Can you share steps to reconnect and verify permissions?
notes: Re-auth Slack; check channel mapping.

subject: Pricing: can we switch to annual billing?
message: We’re on Pro and want to switch to annual billing for 45 seats. Do you provide an annual discount and can you issue an invoice?
escalation_reason: Pricing/annual billing/invoice request requires Billing/RevOps.
notes: Same org as ticket_003; cross-channel account.

subject: Bug report: tasks revert after drag-and-drop
message: When I drag a task from Doing to Done on the Board, it sometimes snaps back to the previous column after a few seconds. This happens to multiple users. Browser: Chrome. Project: Release Board.
escalation_reason: Potential sync/state bug affecting multiple users.
notes: Escalate to Engineering with repro steps and timestamps.

subject: How to bulk reassign tasks
message: We need to reassign a set of tasks to a new engineer within a project. Is there a bulk edit or multi-select option to change assignee?
notes: Bulk edit guidance.

subject: Mobile: not receiving push notifications
message: Push notifications stopped working on Android. Email notifications still come through. Can you help troubleshoot?
notes: Android push troubleshooting.

subject: Permissions: cannot manage members
message: I’m an Admin but can’t invite/remove members. Error says I don’t have permission. What roles can manage members and how do we change this?
notes: Role explanation; owner required.

subject: Timeline: tasks not appearing
message: The Timeline view is empty in a project unless we add dates. Is that expected? Also, where can we quickly filter to find tasks missing due dates?
notes: Dates required; suggest filters and bulk edit.

subject: Service is slow and freezing
message: Boards take 20+ seconds to load and moving tasks freezes the UI. Multiple locations affected. Is there an outage?
escalation_reason: Potential outage/performance incident impacting multiple users.
notes: Matches ticket_010; incident correlation.

subject: Urgent: cannot access workspace
message: Our team cannot access the CandorHealth workspace. Login succeeds but loads a blank page. This is mission-critical.
escalation_reason: High-severity access issue; multiple users impacted.
notes: Cross-channel cluster with CandorHealth tickets 017/037.

subject: Enterprise SSO not working
message: Users are redirected back to sign-in after SSO. Okta SAML. Started yesterday. Can you assist ASAP?
escalation_reason: Enterprise SSO/SAML outage requires specialized escalation.
notes: Cross-channel with email/WhatsApp SSO tickets.

subject: How to turn off duplicate notifications
message: I’m getting too many notification emails, sometimes duplicates. Where can I adjust what triggers an email vs in-app notification?
notes: Guide to Settings → Notifications and watch settings.

subject: Automation: Slack message not sent
message: We set an automation to post to Slack when tasks move to Done. It worked once but stopped. Please help verify conditions and permissions.
notes: Automation troubleshoot; check Slack auth.

subject: Request: full workspace export
message: We need to export all data from our workspace for internal archiving (all projects, tasks, comments). Can you provide a full export?
escalation_reason: Large-scale data export request requires verified escalation.
notes: Escalate; clarify scope and timeline.

subject: General: projects disappeared
message: Several projects are missing from our workspace. Team members report different views. Please investigate urgently.
escalation_reason: Possible data visibility/data integrity incident.
notes: Match WhatsApp missing projects ticket_034.

subject: Feedback: great UI and speed
message: Just wanted to share that FlowSync feels incredibly fast and the UI is very clean. Please keep investing in the Timeline view—it's key for us.
notes: Compliment + product feedback.

message: help
notes: Near-empty web form; must request contact details and clarify issue.

subject: Follow-up: refund status
message: Following up on my refund request from yesterday. Please confirm when the refund will be processed and provide a reference number.
escalation_reason: Refund follow-up remains a billing issue.
notes: Cross-channel follow-up to ticket_004; keep continuity in CRM.
